title: Amtech S4315 Jumbo Aluminium Hook
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: This jumbo hook is made from strong, lightweight aluminium and has a spring-loaded, self-closing mechanism
CARRY HEAVY ITEMS: With a comfortable, cushion grip handle, this carabiner snap hook is ideal for carrying heavy items such as paint tins, buckets, tool bags, coiled wire or cable
NOTE: this product is NOT suitable for climbing use or any other safety application!
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Hook See more
